textByHashes.05fbdfc78c742c4850a17bc752dae78ef0118809: Good day, how may I help you?
textByHashes.2a4ad04a3cd1df8edbce448c564e080e67b0df6a: This is a branch of the Bank of Gielinor. We have branches in many towns.
textByHashes.781a0067d1995aab06ce84a10c586ea4e76e06d0: We will look after your items and money for you. Leave your valuables with us if you want to keep them safe.
textByHashes.0d236a8cd99927e62d53820549ab0ca2f0255107: Ah, we're special bankers who can access your safe deposit box on Deadman Worlds. Would you like to do that now?
textByHashes.dfbb1df9ffdfe2304fc047e82c913d29e144a03a: You don't have any inventory space.
